home.aboutBody:
I'm a Computer Science student at Concordia University passionate about Software Engineering, Cybersecurity, DevOps, and Artificial Intelligence. I enjoy solving complex problems and challenging myself through hands-on projects, primarily in Python and TypeScript.

Seeking internship opportunities in Software Engineering, Cybersecurity, DevOps, or AI/ML.
